creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Quite trivial new config - not work et all:

this looks like the old config format.  the new format is described here and uses the "auths" config key: https://github.com/prometheus/snmp_exporter/blob/main/auth-split-migration.md

> What was the point not enable AUTH_SPLIT?

i don't know what AUTH_SPLIT is.  is this a build or runtime option for the package?  i can't see any reference to it in upstream sources.
